resolutions.motion_text: That we pass By-Law Number 2025-03, being a By-Law to provide for an Interim Tax Levy. Read a first, second and third time and passed this 7th day of January, 2025
resolutions.votes: Moved by J. Scott, Seconded by S. Kirkey

resolutions.motion_text: That we pass By-Law Number 2025-04, being a By-Law to appoint an auditor licensed under the Public Accountancy Act for the Township of Nipissing. Read a first, second and third time and passed this 7th day of January, 2025

resolutions.title: we accept the correspondence as presented

resolutions.title: Accounts Payable – $407,517.24

resolutions.title: Confirming By-Law
resolutions.motion_text: That we pass By-Law 2025-05, being a By-Law to confirm the proceedings of Council at its meeting held on January 7, 2025. Read the first, second and third time and passed this 7th day of January, 2025
resolutions.votes: Moved by S. Foote, Seconded by J. Scott
